rag_rules: Fix missing EOF at 'annex' by ensuring proper AGREE syntax termination in annex blocks.
generic_rules: Use visible AADL features and declared helpers in AGREE contracts to avoid type errors.
Place input assumptions and output guarantees in component type annexes with concrete bounds.
Validate that all identifiers in AGREE expressions are properly declared or visible.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Guarantee expressions must reference only visible identifiers or locally declared helpers.
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture elements to fix AGREE type errors; instead, resolve invalid references or remove clauses.
